input.instructions:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: atlas-derived-A1-compton-unruh-resonance-falsification
Title: A1. Compton-Unruh Resonance Falsification

Question:
Does a particle's Compton frequency resonate with Unruh radiation at cosmological acceleration a ~ cH_0?

Grading target:
Binary:

- correctly dismisses the resonance as impossible
- identifies the dimensional gap

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>

orchestration.decision_notes: The question requires a physics-based reasoning process to evaluate the dimensional consistency and physical possibility of the proposed resonance. I will perform the calculation and reasoning locally.
